title: The problem and the loop
summary: Start with why deck work drifts, then introduce the simple local loop that keeps slideotter understandable.
note: This section sets the operating model before the studio tour.

cards.title: Drift
cards.body: Source, context, options, and output can stop agreeing.

cards.title: Loop
cards.body: Plan, edit, review, and ship inside one local workflow.

cards.title: Payoff
cards.body: The rest of the deck shows how the loop stays inspectable.
